description.value: RIZWAN SEEDS COMPANY is a reputable agricultural seed store in Malerkotla, specializing in high-quality hybrid seeds for modern farming. They offer premium F1 varieties, including Musk Melon F1 (Golden Honey-525 and RSM-2211 Raseela) and Cucumber F1 (RSC-1840 Safran Plus).

address.value: LUDHIANA ROAD, RIZWAN SEED COMPANY, NEAR RADHA SAWAMI SATSANG BHAWAN, MALERKOTLA, Sangrur, Punjab, 148023

products.description: Discover the high-performance Tomato F1 - Roman 50 Hybrid Seeds, engineered for robust growth and superior yields. These premium seeds are available for both bulk agricultural purchase and smaller garden projects, ensuring accessibility for all growers. Ideal for commercial farmers and home gardeners, they promise excellent fruit quality and disease resistance, making them a reliable choice for diverse cultivation needs. Cultivate healthy, flavorful tomatoes with a variety known for its consistent performance and adaptability across different growing conditions.

These high-quality seeds are offered for both large-scale agricultural operations and individual gardening enthusiasts, providing flexibility for various planting needs. Experience consistent harvests and premium quality tomatoes with this acclaimed hybrid seed.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, perfectly round, bright yellow melon held by a hand. A short green stem with a delicate tendril is visible at the top of the fruit. The background is a blurred outdoor scene with green foliage, suggesting a natural, possibly agricultural, setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A bright yellow, round melon with a green stem and tendril, held in a hand against a blurred green foliage background.

visual_features.presentation: natural growing environment with blurred background
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: multiple cucumbers hanging from vines, some with dried yellow flowers at their tips

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a cluster of approximately seven dark green, elongated cucumbers hanging from their vines. Each cucumber has a smooth, slightly ribbed surface and tapers slightly at both ends, with some showing remnants of dried yellow flowers at their tips. The background is blurred, suggesting a natural outdoor or greenhouse setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a cluster of dark green, elongated cucumbers hanging from vines, with blurred natural background.

visual_features.color_appearance: light green with beige/light brown netting
visual_features.presentation: simple studio-like on a ribbed surface
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: distinctive raised netting pattern on the skin

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, whole musk melon fruit, centrally placed. It has a round to slightly oval shape with a light green to beige skin covered in a prominent, raised, light brown netting pattern. The melon appears to be of good quality, resting on a ribbed, possibly corrugated, surface with a blurry, light-colored background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A whole, round musk melon fruit with light green skin and prominent beige netting, resting on a ribbed surface.

reviews.author: Isa Mohd
reviews.text: I'm thrilled with the Capsicum F1 Rsc 2220 purchased from Rizwan Seed Company it has exceeded my expectations in every way...

reviews.author: Mohd Rashid
reviews.text: I have never seen this kind of Cabbage ever. Very high yield. I suggest all farmers to buy Rizwan Seed Company Cabbage F1- Flourish and Cabbage F1-RSC 2485. Rizwan Seed Company all products reachable all the time. From Last 3 years I use only The Rizwan Seed Products.

reviews.author: Vimal Negi
reviews.text: Don't buy these company green peas seed.  Don't waist your hard money.   Wrost seeds.

reviews.author: kapil chaurasia
reviews.text: Very good company in seed industries.

reviews.author: ਅੰਬਰਦੀਪ ਸਿੰਘ ਬੈਨੀਪਾਲ (ਲਹਿੰਦਾ ਚੜ੍ਹਦਾ ਦੋਵੇਂ ਸਾਂਝੇ ਨੇ)
